overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the foggy Badlands desert at night. The player moves along a dilapidated road past abandoned structures with neon signs, transitioning from a semi-urban roadside area to open desert landscape illuminated by distant streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned roadside settlement with neon-lit buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert road past abandoned commercial buildings with red neon signage

entered.detail: abandoned commercial structure with bright red neon signage on the facade
wooden electrical pole with transformer and crossbars
tall sodium vapor street lamp casting orange illumination
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the roadside
overhead electrical wires spanning across the road
elevated water tank structure silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy desert road at night, with the camera moving forward past abandoned buildings featuring prominent red neon signs. Streetlights cast warm orange pools of light on the wet asphalt, while power lines stretch overhead. Sparse desert vegetation and road barriers line the path as a water tower becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road with illuminated bus stop shelter

events.description: approaching and passing a green-lit bus stop shelter on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road past the green neon-lit bus shelter and speed limit signs

entered.detail: bus stop shelter with bright green neon lighting and advertisement displays
road sign indicating speed limit of 40 miles per hour

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the initial commercial area and approaches a distinctive bus stop shelter illuminated by green neon light. The red neon building and road barriers fall behind as the water tower draws closer on the left. A speed limit sign appears on the right as the road continues into the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: isolated desert highway with distant illumination

events.description: ambient light decreases significantly as moving away from streetlights into darker desert

agents.ego_description: walking into the open desert toward distant lights visible on the horizon

entered.detail: cluster of orange streetlights visible far down the road

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, more isolated stretch of desert road as the bus stop and nearby structures are left behind. The water tower recedes into the distance on the left while the camera moves toward a cluster of distant streetlights. The ambient lighting dims considerably, with only the orange glow of distant lamps and the dark silhouette of power lines visible against the hazy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a foggy desert road at night, transitioning from a neon-lit roadside area into a dark, isolated wasteland. It begins by gliding past abandoned buildings with glowing red neon signs and orange streetlights reflecting off wet asphalt, while power lines stretch overhead toward a distant water tower. As the camera moves forward, the red glow fades and the scene shifts toward a bus stop shelter illuminated by green neon light, passing a speed limit sign as the water tower draws closer on the left. The environment then opens into a darker, more desolate stretch of road as the structures and neon lights recede behind the viewer. Finally, the ambient lighting dims considerably, leaving only the orange glow of distant streetlights and the silhouettes of power lines against the hazy night sky.
